tests.test_name: Adding more than the maximum files shows a warning toast and rejects the file
tests.feature: Multi-file mode — file limits and validation

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked; And the multi-file API is mocked; And I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Mocks both the analysis and multi-file APIs and navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario.

tests.journey: A user who has already filled the queue to the maximum limit attempts to add one more file and is blocked with a warning toast, confirming the hard cap is enforced.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Adding more than the maximum files shows a warning toast and rejects the file
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Multi-file mode is enabled and the queue is at the maximum file limit
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User attempts to add another file to the queue
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: A warning toast about the file limit is shown and the queue file count does not increase

tests.test_name: Adding two files when one slot remains toasts and accepts only the first
tests.feature: Multi-file mode — file limits and validation

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked; And the multi-file API is mocked; And I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Mocks both the analysis and multi-file APIs and navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario.

tests.journey: A user with one slot remaining in the queue attempts to add two files simultaneously; only the first is accepted, the second is rejected with a warning toast, verifying partial-batch boundary enforcement.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Adding two files when one slot remains toasts and accepts only the first
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Multi-file mode is enabled and the queue contains 19 files (one slot remaining)
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User attempts to add 2 files at once
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: A warning toast about the file limit is shown and the queue shows exactly 20 files

tests.test_name: A file with no test cases shows an error badge at selection time
tests.feature: Multi-file mode — file limits and validation

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked; And the multi-file API is mocked; And I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Mocks both the analysis and multi-file APIs and navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario.

tests.journey: A user selects BDD format and adds a feature file that contains no scenarios; the queue immediately flags the file with an error badge and a descriptive message, preventing silent submission of empty files.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: A file with no test cases shows an error badge at selection time
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Multi-file mode is enabled and analysis format is set to BDD
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User adds fixture 'bdd_no_scenarios.feature' to the queue
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: The file row shows an error badge and the error message mentions 'No test cases found'

tests.test_name: A file in the wrong format shows a warning badge at selection time
tests.feature: Multi-file mode — file limits and validation

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked; And the multi-file API is mocked; And I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Mocks both the analysis and multi-file APIs and navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario.

tests.journey: A user selects BDD format but adds a Playwright TypeScript spec file; the queue immediately flags the format mismatch with a warning badge, alerting the user before any analysis is triggered.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: A file in the wrong format shows a warning badge at selection time
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Multi-file mode is enabled and analysis format is set to BDD
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User adds fixture 'playwright_single_sample.spec.ts' to the queue
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: The file row for 'playwright_single_sample.spec.ts' shows a warning badge

tests.test_name: A file that exceeds the size limit shows an error badge at selection time
tests.feature: Multi-file mode — file limits and validation

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked; And the multi-file API is mocked; And I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Mocks both the analysis and multi-file APIs and navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario.

tests.journey: A user adds a file that exceeds the allowed size limit; the queue immediately rejects it with an error badge and a 'File too large' message, enforcing the upload size constraint at selection time.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: A file that exceeds the size limit shows an error badge at selection time
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User adds an oversized file to the queue
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: The file row shows an error badge and the error message mentions 'File too large'

tests.test_name: A valid file shows an ok badge
tests.feature: Multi-file mode — file limits and validation

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked; And the multi-file API is mocked; And I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Mocks both the analysis and multi-file APIs and navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario.

tests.journey: A user selects BDD format and adds a well-formed feature file; the queue immediately confirms the file is valid by displaying an ok badge, providing positive feedback before submission.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: A valid file shows an ok badge
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Multi-file mode is enabled and analysis format is set to BDD
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User adds fixture 'bdd_sample.feature' to the queue
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: The file row for 'bdd_sample.feature' shows an ok badge
